title: HORIZON-MSCA-2026-PF-01 Postdoctoral Fellowships
summary: MSCA PF 2026 call supporting researcher mobility, advanced skills, and postdoctoral projects with bottom-up topic selection.
reality_check: High-fit route for UJF talent strategy, but outcomes depend on strong candidate-host pairing, mobility eligibility, and early proposal shaping.
action_note: Highest-priority active window for immediate candidate scouting and proposal shaping.

title: ERC Advanced Grant
summary: Frontier-research funding for established principal investigators with a strong track record and ambitious scientific vision.
reality_check: Open on paper, but effectively restricted to senior researchers with exceptional track record, sharp independence, and a genuinely ambitious agenda.

title: Horizon Europe Research Infrastructures 2026
summary: Active INFRA calls for access, upgrades, and service development across major research infrastructures and data ecosystems.
reality_check: Very relevant for UJF, but practical entry usually requires an existing RI network position or long-term partners rather than a fresh standalone bid.

title: HORIZON-EURATOM-2026-01
summary: Open Euratom call covering nuclear safety, SMRs and advanced reactors, materials, and stable-isotope topics including nuclear medicine directions.
reality_check: Very strong UJF fit for consortium projects in radiation technologies and materials, but proposals need credible multi-partner implementation and application impact.

title: HORIZON-CL4-2026-01-MAT-PROD-04 Materials and Production Innovation
summary: Cluster 4 topic focused on next-generation manufacturing technologies and resource-efficient production for advanced materials and components.
reality_check: High-value route for detector mechanics and bespoke assemblies, but timing is critical and consortium maturity is a hard gate.

title: HORIZON-CL4-2026-01-MAT-PROD-23 AI-Enabled Materials Discovery
summary: Cluster 4 topic accelerating advanced materials and chemical development through AI-enabled discovery and digital modelling workflows.
reality_check: Very strong strategic fit for data-driven detector material R&D, with clear value if UJF can anchor simulation and validation contributions.

title: DIGITAL Europe Large-Scale Pilots for AI and GenAI in Medical Imaging
summary: Digital Europe call line for large-scale deployment pilots of AI and GenAI tools in medical imaging workflows.
reality_check: Relevant mainly through clinical and data-hub partnerships; UJF impact is strongest when positioned on physics-informed methods and validation.

title: TA CR SIGMA - Applied Research for Public Needs
summary: National applied research support for consortia solving practical public-sector or societal needs with measurable outputs.
reality_check: Open and potentially relevant, but the practical chance stays low without a concrete implementation or industry-facing partner and a deliverable beyond basic research.

title: OP JAK - Top Research
summary: Large-scale Czech calls aimed at research excellence, capacity building, and development of major scientific teams and infrastructure.
reality_check: Relevant for institutional growth, but this is mainly a planned institutional track that needs internal prioritization long before launch.

title: M-ERA.NET Call 2026
summary: Materials research and innovation funding in international consortia with potential detector and radiation-material overlap.
reality_check: Potentially relevant, but only through a prepared international consortium and a concrete detector or radiation-material angle.

title: GA CR Postdoc Individual Fellowship
summary: Individual postdoctoral funding scheme in the Czech Republic.
reality_check: Worth watching as an expected individual route for incoming candidates, but it still depends on a very strong applicant profile and confirmed call timing.

title: GA CR EXPRO
summary: High-risk, high-gain projects for experienced researchers.
reality_check: Technically still open, but the window is short and realistic only for top PIs with a strong publication record and near-ready concept.

title: GA CR Junior Star
summary: Funding for early-career researchers to build independent teams.
reality_check: Technically still open, but the remaining window is short and the call is realistic only for junior researchers with clearly demonstrated independence.

title: OP JAK - Vyzkumne infrastruktury II
summary: Planned call for development of research infrastructures and e-infrastructures.
reality_check: Relevant at institutional level, but this remains a planned line that needs internal prioritization and later call confirmation.

title: GA CR - Croatia-Czech Projects 2027
summary: Bilateral GA CR and HRZZ call for Croatia-Czech basic research projects under the Lead Agency scheme.
reality_check: Relevant only where an existing Czech-Croatian partnership already exists; the bilateral partner route is the main gating factor, not just the deadline.
